source_intent.raw_intent: Case 015: I am a finance_operator in Middle East. Build a blueprint_design_doc for blueprint_design_doc using the failure_lens. Chaos input type is depth_tier_ambiguity. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Design a production-grade blueprint document for a financial operations system in the Middle East, incorporating failure-lens analysis to identify and mitigate operational risks, with explicit validation gates at each stage. Scope: - The blueprint covers system architecture, data flow, compliance with regional financial regulations (e.g., AML, KYC), failure mode enumeration, risk mitigation strategies, and validation checkpoints. Excludes real-time trading systems and legacy migration details. Constraints: - Must comply with Middle Eastern financial regulations (e.g., Saudi Arabian Monetary Authority, UAE Central Bank). - All data must be encrypted at rest and in transit. - System must support Arabic and English interfaces. - Failure-lens analysis must identify at least 5 distinct failure modes with probability and impact ratings. - Validation gates must be defined for design, implementation, and deployment phases. Success Criteria: - Blueprint document is reviewed and approved by a compliance officer. - All failure modes have assigned mitigation actions with owners. - Validation gates are documented with pass/fail criteria and sign-off requirements. - Document is version-controlled and stored in a secure repository. Output Contract: - format: PDF with embedded metadata (version, author, date, approval status) - sections: Executive Summary; System Overview and Architecture; Failure-Lens Analysis (failure modes, probabilities, impacts, mitigations); Validation Gates (design gate, implementation gate, deployment gate); Compliance and Regulatory Alignment; Risk Register; Appendices (glossary, references, change log) - deliverable: A single PDF file meeting the above structure, with all sections populated and validation gates explicitly defined.
